Sign in

Help
About
Getting started
How do I create an account?
Click Create account, enter your name, a unique @handle, email and password. You'll receive a 6-digit verification code by email to activate your account.
Is it free?
Yes — every account starts with 20 free AI messages per day. Upgrade to Pro or Ultra for higher limits and extra features.
I forgot my password
Click Sign in, then use the Forgot password? link below the form. We'll email you a reset code.
Using Sought AI
Can I use it on mobile?
Yes — Sought AI is fully responsive. Open it in any mobile browser and it works like a native app, including a proper keyboard-safe layout.
Can I switch AI models?
Yes — tap the model name in the top bar to open a dropdown and pick from all available models.
How do I change the theme?
Open the sidebar, scroll to Settings, and choose from 20+ themes including dark, ocean, anime, and more.
Sought AI
"Your AI for everything."
A unified AI workspace — combining powerful language models, image generation, and deep personalisation into one beautifully designed platform. Built for curious minds who want fast, intelligent answers without switching between a dozen apps.

✦ Changelog — v13
Updated
Visual refresh — softer message bubbles, refined sidebar hierarchy, and a more polished input bar
New
Surge Ultra model — blazing fast 70B responses with speculative decoding
New
Mood Canvas v2 — 8 mood states, smooth WebGL blending, dynamic particle systems
New
File generation — AI wraps content in download cards you can save instantly
Updated
30+ themes added including Naruto, JJK, Demon Slayer, Spy × Family
Fixed
SSE streaming stability for Blaze model across all connections
Updated
Cross-device sync via Firestore — pick up any chat from any device

Set your Groq API Key
Sought AI uses Groq for fast, free AI responses. Get your free key at console.groq.com → API Keys → Create API Key.
Steps:
1. Go to console.groq.com and sign up (free)
2. Click API Keys in the left menu
3. Click Create API Key — copy the key (starts with gsk_)
4. Paste it below and click Save

⌘ Command

NameEmailPlanMessages TodayJoined
NameEmailPlanMsgs TodaySupportersFollowers✓RobloxActions
SOUGHT COMMAND INTERFACE — SUPER MODE
sought@ultra:~$ Ready. Enter command below.
sought@ultra:~$
Available Commands
🎨 Admin Themes
theme;voidcore 🕳 Void Core — absolute darkness, deep purple singularity
theme;godmode ✨ God Mode — divine gold radiance
theme;hackerman 💻 Hackerman — terminal green, full monospace override
theme;bloodmoon 🩸 Blood Moon — deep crimson darkness
theme;glitch ⚡ Glitch — corrupted magenta/cyan cyber aesthetic
theme;ultraviolet 🔮 Ultraviolet — beyond-visible-spectrum purple
theme;ice 🧊 Ice Core — sub-zero crystalline blue
theme;reset Reset to default Parchment theme
⚡ Animations
Naruto;animationTimer3 🍥 Naruto vs Sasuke clash animation
matrix;rain 💊 Matrix digital rain overlay
fireworks;launch 🎆 Fireworks celebration
deathnote;[name] 📓 Death Note — write a name and watch the countdown
🔍 Web & Search
web;search [query] Search the web and display results in terminal
news;latest [topic] Fetch latest news/updates on any topic
🎉 Fun
joke 😄 Get a random joke
fact 🧠 Get a random fun fact
flip;coin 🪙 Flip a coin
roll;[sides] 🎲 Roll a die — e.g. roll;20 for a d20
🛠 Tools
calc;[expr] Calculator — e.g. calc;2+2*10
weather;[city] 🌤 Live weather for any city
date 🕐 Show current date and time
⚙️ System
SOUGHT;SUPERMODE 🚀 Activate Super Sought — max power mode
whoami Show your account info
version Show Sought AI version info
creator Who made Sought AI?
grant;ultra Grant Ultra plan to your account
sys;info System diagnostics — user count, plan stats, storage
clear Clear the terminal output
🛡 Utilities
timer;[secs] ⏲ Countdown timer — e.g. timer;60 for 1 minute
stopwatch ⏱ Start/stop a live stopwatch (click twice)
password;[len] 🔑 Secure random password — auto-copies to clipboard
uuid 🆔 Generate UUID v4 — auto-copies to clipboard
note;[text] 📝 Save a quick note to terminal memory
notes 📋 List all saved notes
notes;clear 🗑 Delete all saved notes
base64;[text] 🔐 Base64 encode — use base64;decode;[str] to decode
random;[min];[max] 🎰 Random number in range — e.g. random;1;100
morse;[text] · – Convert text to Morse code (auto-copies)
percent;[x];[y] % Calculate x% of y — e.g. percent;15;200

📢 Site-wide Banner
Show a dismissible banner to every logged-in user instantly — no email required. Stored in Firestore and delivered in real time.
Active banner
📧 Email Broadcast
Send an email announcement to every registered user. Uses EmailJS — make sure the broadcast template ID is set in Settings.
Grant another account full Admin Panel access (admin-exclusive models, themes, and command tools). Only the owner account can manage this list.

What are you
seeking today?
🧠
Multiple AI Models
Switch between Blaze for speed, Surge for balance, or Apex for deep reasoning — all in one chat.
🔍
Live Web Search
Type /search to pull real-time results straight into your conversation. Stay current without leaving the chat.
🎨
Image & Video Generation
Describe anything and Sought AI brings it to life — stunning images and AI-crafted video clips on demand.
🎮
Roblox Integration
Link your Roblox account to get AI-powered help building games, scripting Lua, and designing obstacle courses.
🎙️
Voice Input
Tap the mic and speak your message. Sought AI transcribes it instantly so you can chat hands-free.
✨
Extended Thinking
Activate deep reasoning mode for complex problems — maths, code, strategy — and get answers that go further.
Explain quantum computing Write me a short story Best productivity tips? Build a Roblox obstacle course 🔍 Web Search /search latest AI news

↵ send  ·  ⇧↵ newline
✦ New: Card 3
Card 3:
Our latest model
Card 3 brings elite-tier reasoning to your chats — powered by a 120B-parameter mixture-of-experts model with deep, careful thinking on hard problems.
💳
Included in the Ultra plan Card 3 is our most powerful model — best for complex reasoning, coding, and multi-step problems.
Switch models when flagged When a model can't respond, automatically fall back to the next available one to keep your chat flowing. When off, the chat pauses instead.
🧠
Deep reasoning Card 3 takes more time per token to think through tricky logic, math, and code — built for quality over raw speed.

Sought AI — Terms & Conditions

Last updated: June 2026. By using Sought AI, you agree to the following terms. Please read them carefully.

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using Sought AI ("the Service"), you confirm that you are at least 13 years of age and agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree, please do not use the Service.

2. Use of the Service

Sought AI is an AI-powered chat platform. You agree to use it only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms. You must not:

  • Use the Service to generate harmful, illegal, or abusive content.
  • Attempt to reverse-engineer or exploit the platform.
  • Share your account credentials with others.
  • Use the Service to spam, harass, or harm other users.

3. Accounts & Plans

Sought AI offers Free, Paragon, and Ultra plans. Features vary by plan. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or terminate accounts that violate these terms. Paid plans are billed as described at the time of purchase.

4. AI-Generated Content

Responses from Sought AI are generated by artificial intelligence and may not always be accurate, complete, or up to date. Do not rely on AI responses for professional, medical, legal, or financial advice. You are responsible for how you use any content generated by the Service.

5. Privacy & Cookies

We use cookies and local storage to keep you signed in and personalise your experience. We do not sell your personal data to third parties. Sought AI uses Firebase for authentication and data storage. By using the Service, you consent to this use of cookies.

6. Intellectual Property

All branding, design, model names (including Regus and Card), and platform features are the property of Sought AI. You may not copy or redistribute them without permission.

7. Limitation of Liability

Sought AI is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any damages arising from your use of the Service, including data loss or service interruptions.

8. Changes to Terms

We may update these Terms at any time. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new Terms. We will indicate the date of the latest update at the top of this document.

9. Contact

For questions about these Terms, please reach out via the Sought AI platform or the official website at soughtai.co.uk.

By accepting, you confirm you have read and agree to these terms.
